title: Rename device - Rename, emojis not allowed
scenario: Device name should not accept emojis in Device Settings > General; Done button should be disabled and name unchanged on Home screen
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Tap on the device name or settings icon to access Device Settings.
Tap on the device name field to edit it.
Enter one or more emoji characters (e.g., 😀, 🎧, ❤️) as the device name.
Observe the state of the "Done" button (or equivalent save/confirm button).
Attempt to tap "Done" to save the change.
Return to the Home screen and observe the displayed device name.
expected: The "Done" button should be disabled/grayed out when emojis are entered as the device name. Tapping "Done" should not save the change. The device name on the Home screen should remain unchanged (the previous valid name).
